label: reasoning channel • conversation ABOUT thinking doesn't leak think tokens
query: In two or three sentences, explain the difference between thinking out loud and thinking silently when solving a puzzle.
notes: Vocabulary-pressure row: the topic pushes the model toward 'thinking' vocabulary, the region of token space where a buggy parser or a weakly-bounded model is most likely to emit literal <think>-family protocol markers. The built-in marker sweep is the whole assertion; the natural-language word 'thinking' itself is of course allowed. Off-CI (needs a model).
